title: Four Mice Deep in the Jungle
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked by his family into a jungle survival school where he faces his fears and becomes a brave little mouse! 🌴

q.en: What newspaper does Geronimo Stilton run in New Mouse City?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿在老鼠岛首府新鼠城经营的是哪份报纸？

options.en: The Cheese Daily
options.zh: 《奶酪日报》

options.en: The Mouse Times
options.zh: 《老鼠时报》

options.en: The Rodent's Gazette
options.zh: 《啮齿动物公报》

options.en: The Whisker Weekly according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 《胡须周刊》（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo runs The Rodent's Gazette, the most popular paper on Mouse Island, where his sister Thea works as a special correspondent.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩经营着《啮齿动物公报》，这是老鼠岛上最受欢迎的报纸，他的妹妹蒂奥是这家报纸的特约记者。

q.en: Why did Geronimo go to see Dr. Shrinkfur the psychiatrist?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩为什么要去看心理医生收缩毛医生？

options.en: He had a bad toothache
options.zh: 他牙痛得厉害

options.en: He wanted to publish a book
options.zh: 他想出版一本书

options.en: He wanted to learn how to fly according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他想学习飞行（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He was afraid of many things and needed to face his fears
options.zh: 他害怕很多东西，需要学会面对恐惧

explain.en: Geronimo was a 'fraidy mouse' afraid of elevators, flying, spiders, the dark and more; Dr. Shrinkfur told him he must face his fears to get well.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩是个“胆小鬼老鼠”，害怕电梯、飞行、蜘蛛、黑暗等许多东西；收缩毛医生告诉他，要好转就必须去面对自己的恐惧。

q.en: Which three family members tricked Geronimo into a car and flew him to the jungle?
q.zh: 是哪三位家人把杰罗尼摩骗上车、又带他坐飞机去了丛林？

options.en: His parents
options.zh: 他的父母

options.en: His sister Thea, cousin Trap, and nephew Benjamin
options.zh: 他的妹妹蒂奥、表哥特拉普和侄子本杰明

options.en: His aunt and uncle
options.zh: 他的姑姑和叔叔

options.en: His brother and two friends according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他的哥哥和两位朋友（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Thea, Trap and Benjamin lured him with a box of Cheesy Chews, grabbed him, and drove him to the airport to fly to Rattytrap Jungle.
explain.zh: 蒂奥、特拉普和本杰明用一盒“芝士啃啃”引他开门，把他抱上车，开车送他去机场，飞往捕鼠陷阱丛林。

q.en: On the plane, a fan named Penelope Poisonfur got Geronimo to sign a form. What did it sign him up for?
q.zh: 在飞机上，一位叫佩内洛普·毒毛的粉丝让杰罗尼摩签了一份表格。这份表格让他报名参加了什么？

options.en: A seven-day jungle survival course
options.zh: 为期七天的丛林生存训练营

options.en: A free cheese-tasting tour
options.zh: 免费的奶酪品尝之旅

options.en: A relaxing resort vacation
options.zh: 轻松的度假村休假

options.en: A writing class for young authors according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 面向年轻作家的写作课（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Penelope tricked him into signing up for the 'To the Last Whisker Survival School,' a tough seven-day course in Rattytrap Jungle.
explain.zh: 佩内洛普骗他报名了“坚持到最后一根胡须生存学校”，那是捕鼠陷阱丛林里一个为期七天、十分艰苦的训练营。

q.en: The form said that if Geronimo refused to obey Ms. Poisonfur, what would happen?
q.zh: 表格上写道，如果杰罗尼摩拒绝服从毒毛小姐，会发生什么事？

options.en: He would have to pay a fine of one million dollars
options.zh: 他必须支付一百万美元的罚款

options.en: He would be sent straight home according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他会立刻被送回家（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He would be fed to the snakes
options.zh: 他会成为蛇的食物

options.en: He would lose his newspaper
options.zh: 他会失去自己的报纸

explain.en: The small print said that refusing to take part or obey would cost a fine of one million dollars, which Geronimo could not pay.
explain.zh: 表格的小字写明，拒绝参加或不服从都要缴纳一百万美元罚款，而杰罗尼摩根本付不起这笔钱。

q.en: On Day 3 (Wednesday), Geronimo had to climb a very tall tree to build a tree house. Who helped him?
q.zh: 在第三天（星期三），杰罗尼摩必须爬上一棵很高的树去搭建树屋。是谁帮了他？

options.en: His nephew Benjamin according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他的侄子本杰明（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: His cousin Trap
options.zh: 他的表哥特拉普

options.en: Sandy Silverfur
options.zh: 桑迪·银毛

options.en: Suzie Squeakers, a friend of Pinky Pick
options.zh: 苏西·吱吱，粉粉·皮克的伙伴

explain.en: Suzie Squeakers, a Gerbil Scout and friend of Pinky Pick, followed him up the tree and told him 'don't look down' so he could build the shelter.
explain.zh: 苏西·吱吱是沙鼠童子军、也是粉粉·皮克的朋友，她跟着杰罗尼摩爬上树，并教他“别往下看”，帮他搭好了树屋。

q.en: On Day 2 (Tuesday), while crossing the Rio Mosquito on a rope, what happened?
q.zh: 在第二天（星期二），大家抓着绳子渡过蚊子河时，发生了什么？

options.en: They crossed safely with no trouble
options.zh: 他们平安渡过，毫无麻烦

options.en: A snake bit Benjamin
options.zh: 一条蛇咬了本杰明

options.en: Tubby fell in and Geronimo saved him with mouse-to-mouse resuscitation
options.zh: 塔比掉了下去，杰罗尼摩用老鼠对老鼠人工呼吸救了他

options.en: Geronimo fell and Trap saved him according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩掉了下去，特拉普救了他（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Tubby lost his grip and splashed into the river; Geronimo dove in, dragged him out by the tail, and gave him mouse-to-mouse resuscitation.
explain.zh: 塔比没抓稳绳子掉进了河里；杰罗尼摩跳下水，抓住他的尾巴把他拖上岸，并给他做了老鼠对老鼠的人工呼吸。

q.en: On Day 4 (Thursday), Geronimo got lost in the forest with Burt Burlyrat. What did he learn about B.B.?
q.zh: 在第四天（星期四），杰罗尼摩和伯特·壮毛在森林里迷了路。他发现了伯特的什么秘密？

options.en: B.B. was really Ms. Poisonfur in disguise according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 伯特其实是伪装起来的毒毛小姐（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: B.B. was not a real forest ranger but worked at Mouseyworld park
options.zh: 伯特并不是真正的森林管理员，而是在鼠鼠世界游乐园工作

options.en: B.B. could not read at all
options.zh: 伯特根本不会认字

options.en: B.B. was Geronimo's long-lost brother
options.zh: 伯特是杰罗尼摩失散多年的兄弟

explain.en: B.B. got lost too and admitted he was only a pretend forest ranger at Mouseyworld, the popular rodents' amusement park, which is why he couldn't read the compass.
explain.zh: 伯特自己也迷了路，并承认自己只是在热门的鼠鼠世界游乐园里扮演森林管理员，所以才看不懂指南针。

q.en: On Day 6 (Saturday), Geronimo faced his fear of spiders. What was the surprise?
q.zh: 在第六天（星期六），杰罗尼摩面对了自己对蜘蛛的恐惧。最后的惊喜是什么？

options.en: The spider placed on his snout was actually made of plastic
options.zh: 放在他鼻子上的那只蜘蛛其实是塑料做的

options.en: It was a toy mouse
options.zh: 那是一只玩具老鼠

options.en: It was just a leaf
options.zh: 那只是一片树叶

options.en: It was a real tiny spider according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 那是一只真正的微型蜘蛛（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Penelope counted down while a 'spider' sat on his snout, then revealed it was plastic and Geronimo had bravely stayed still the whole time.
explain.zh: 毒毛小姐让一只“蜘蛛”趴在杰罗尼摩鼻子上并倒数计时，最后揭晓那是塑料做的，而杰罗尼摩全程勇敢地一动不动。

q.en: At the end of the story, what showed that Geronimo had truly become brave?
q.zh: 在故事结尾，哪件事说明杰罗尼摩真的变得勇敢了？

options.en: He ran away from the jungle
options.zh: 他逃出了丛林

options.en: He calmly picked up and whirled the poisonous snake instead of the harmless one
options.zh: 他镇定地抓起那条有毒的蛇转圈挥舞，而不是那条无害的蛇

options.en: He refused to climb any tree according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他拒绝爬任何树（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He cried for his mother
options.zh: 他哭着找妈妈

explain.en: When Geronimo grabbed the wrong snake — the poisonous one — and stayed calm, Penelope saw he was no longer the 'fraidy mouse he used to be.
explain.zh: 当杰罗尼摩抓错了蛇——抓起了那条有毒的蛇——却依然镇定时，毒毛小姐看出他再也不是从前那个“胆小鬼老鼠”了。
